description: Configure Stellarium to simulate the sky from the Moon's surface at Tranquility Base (0.67°N, 23.47°E) on December 25, 2030, at 12:00 UTC, referencing the project brief at /home/ga/data/lunar_game_project.json. The simulation must represent an airless world with constellation lines, constellation labels, and planet labels enabled, but with the atmosphere and ground disabled. Capture screenshots of Earth, Saturn, and a wide-field starfield view showing constellation lines. Document the location, date, and captured targets in a notes file at /home/ga/Desktop/lunar_sky_notes.txt.
